title: convallaria keiskei
intro: Convallaria keiskei, also known as Japanese lilyturf or Keiske's lilyturf, is a type of flowering plant native to Japan. It is a low-growing, perennial grass with purple flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Convallaria keiskei is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
